title: Migrated Trigger Abbreviations
breadcrumbs: Special Considerations When Migrating from Uniface 9
text: Migrated Trigger Abbreviations Prior to Uniface 10, most triggers were defined in their own container and the name of this container could be accessed using the <$triggerAbbr> precompiler constant. To maintain compatibility, the migration facility explicitly defines the value of <$triggerAbbr> for Uniface 9 triggers, if the migrated code contains the <$triggerAbbr> keyword, or #include . (The IDE logical MIGRATION_TRIGGERABBR can be used to configure this migration behavior). For more information, see Migration of ProcScript , Migration Logicals , and <$triggerAbbr> . The following table lists the abbreviations that the are defined for Uniface 9 triggers during migration.
